summary: Implemented Phase 10 API provider contract preflight artifacts. The preflight records provider and credential source as pending human selection, stores no secret values, records hard cost ceilings and single paid-smoke approval requirements, and makes no network or paid provider call.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate P review. After Gate P, a real paid smoke call still requires human selection of provider, credential source, model policy, and single-call budget.
notes: Credential source remains pending_human_selection and no secret value is stored.
No network or paid provider call occurred.
